critical_diagnosis_a2_tool_mode_collapse.evidence_eval_log: /workspace/a2_tool_train.log eval@1300/1400/1500 produced identical output: Tool call: search_web, {"query":"latest news about AI"}<|im_end|>
critical_diagnosis_a2_tool_mode_collapse.root_cause: 92% corpus malformed + only 250 valid tool-call records across 10+ tools = insufficient signal. Model confabulates 'search_web' from 'web_search'. Smooth loss curve (0.04-0.08) masked the mode collapse.
critical_diagnosis_a2_tool_mode_collapse.implication_for_70b: D4 gate FAILED is not transient. A2-Tool LoRA fundamentally flawed. 70B build should NOT chain A2-Tool as-is — either rebuild corpus (parse malformed 3000 → clean) or drop tool LoRA from chain.
corrective_prescription: Parse 3000 malformed records, extract tool name from nested schemas OR drop them
Target ≥10k balanced tool-call examples (current valid count ≤250)
Add eval gate: output entropy across eval batch > threshold (catches mode collapse before training completes)
Rebuild corpus BEFORE any 70B A2-Tool chain
